meaning: adj.横卧的,匍匐的,爬在地上的
examples: Perennial herbs or subshrubs with erect or decumbent hairy stems.
African shrub having decumbent stems and slender yellow honey-scented flowers either solitary or in pairs.
Herbs perennial, annual, or biennial, acaulescent, rarely caulescent with ascending or decumbent shoots from a caudex.
